creator: daniel@roe.ch
text:
I approve of this patch, please remove the spurious line.
Judging by the history, it must have sneaked in while committing
the original PR which updated Nmap to 5.21.

Thanks for reporting!

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144401

-- 
Daniel Roethlisberger
http://daniel.roe.ch/
